title: Guardrail Checkpoint Download
description: Downloading safety guardrail model weights for text and video modality guardrails
activities: os.makedirs(destination_root, exist_ok=True) — create dest dir if not exists
[LOOP] For each model_id in models list:
Parse model_id: split on ':' to extract revision (optional), else revision=None
[EXCEPT Exception] raise RuntimeError('Error downloading {model_id}: ... Please delete the directory and try again.')

decision_points.true_branch: print success message, continue to next model

key_functions.name: download_guardrail_checkpoints
key_functions.role: Orchestrator — defines model list, ensures dest dir exists, delegates to download_models

key_functions.name: download_models
key_functions.role: Worker — iterates over model IDs, resolves revisions, calls snapshot_download per model

external_dependencies: huggingface_hub.snapshot_download — downloads model repo snapshot to local_dir
error_handling: Any exception from snapshot_download is caught and re-raised as RuntimeError with user-friendly message
important_notes: Model IDs support optional revision pinning via 'org/model:revision' format. Destination follows 'destination_root/org/model' structure. Script default destination is 'checkpoints/'.
